subcodes.first_line: There is no power nor strength save in God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great. O God! Bestow Thy blessings, grant Thy peace, and shower Thy benedictions. I beseech Thee by the sanctified realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. و لا حول و لا قوة الا بالله العلی العظیم اللهم صل و سلم و بارک و المفازات اقسم علیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
full_text_parts: There is no power nor strength except in God, the Most Exalted, the Most Mighty. O Lord! Enable all the peoples of the earth to gain admittance into the Paradise of Thy Faith, so that no created being may remain beyond the bounds of Thy good-pleasure. From time immemorial Thou hast been potent to do what pleaseth Thee and transcendent above whatsoever Thou desirest.
